title: ゆーわく！　ふにゃ～ん！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Urara, la la la! ♪ I wonder what training will be
like today? ♪

text_block_list.name: Merchant Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Urara! Just in time! Do you mind trying my
carrot candy?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Candy?! Really? Really?! Of course I will!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! So good! These will fly off the shelves! I
guarantee it!

text_block_list.name: Merchant Lady
text_block_list.text:
Hoho, glad to hear it! You bring a smile to my
face, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, really? Then I'll sample however much
you want me to!

text_block_list.name: Merchant Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how sweet of you! Here, let me go bring
more.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'll have Trainer try some too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, wait! AHH! Training's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What should I do? I can't leave the candy, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I got it! I'll just bring some to Trainer after! I'm
so smart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's heart is stolen by the candy, and as
a result she ditches today's training.
